ai_providers_page_subtitle: Bring your own AI. Keys are stored in the system Keychain; local models keep every word on this device.
ai_recommended_setup_desc: A guided plan that picks providers for each capability.
ai_assignment_matrix_desc: Route each AI capability to a provider per account.
ai_providers_empty: No AI provider configured yet. Add a cloud provider, connect a local model, or start from the recommended setup.
ai_remove_confirm_body: AI features for {name} stop until another provider is configured. The saved key stays in your system Keychain.
ai_save_failed: Saving the provider configuration failed. Please try again.
ai_key_masked: Key saved in Keychain — enter a new key to replace it
ai_model_load_error: Could not fetch the model list. Pick a model below or enter one manually.
ai_model_picker_hint: Enter your API key, then Load models to pull the live list — or choose Custom to type any model ID your provider supports.
ai_test_fail_404: Model not found on this endpoint.
ai_test_fail_unreachable: Could not reach the provider endpoint.
ai_test_fail_quota: The provider is rate-limiting requests. Try again shortly.
ai_model_custom_hint: You can enter any model ID your provider supports.
ai_local_found: {count, plural, one {# local service found} other {# local services found}}
ai_local_manual_toggle: Not found? Enter the address manually
ai_local_models_empty: No models installed on this daemon. Pull a model with Ollama first.
ai_local_models_error: Could not read the model list from this endpoint.
ai_local_primary_hint: The first selected model becomes this account's default.
ai_automation_e1_desc: AI suggests only. You write and send.
ai_automation_e2_desc: AI drafts replies. You approve before sending.
ai_automation_e3_confirm: Full Auto mode will send emails without your review for this account.
ai_master_switch_desc: Temporarily disable every AI capability across all accounts. While disabled, no provider is ever called — drafting, analysis, sensitivity checks, and auto-send all pause until you turn AI back on.
ai_master_switch_active: AI is active across all accounts
ai_master_switch_paused_hours: AI paused — about {hours, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}} left
